published_prior_art.cite: Gunsilius2023DiSCo gives a weighted quantile-function target, but not the full monotone compatibility-set sharpness statement.

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_synth_control_factor_misspec/v1 is scalar bounded-factor partial ID; panel_sdid_mc_id/v1 is mean-estimator equality, not distributional rank-factor ID.

published_prior_art.cite: ChenDoladoGonzalo2021QFM estimates quantile factors; Gunsilius2023DiSCo constructs weighted quantile controls; neither gives the augmented row-span/LP-envelope finite-donor causal boundary.

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_synth_control_factor_misspec/v1 has scalar Chebyshev-tube misspecification, not open-set quantile-rank nonidentification under exact distributional pre-fit.

published_prior_art.cite: Chen2020DistributionalSC allows poor matching and Gunsilius2023DiSCo gives a DiSCo curve, but neither gives an open-set augmented-affine escape result under exact distributional pre-fit.
Gunsilius2023DiSCo covers the stable convex weighted quantile-curve corner; the theorem is mainly a sanity-preserving sufficient condition.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Assumption postconstant quantifies over all B in B(P), including compatible systems whose q_B is not an admissible monotone quantile function; point identification of Q_I(P) only requires constancy over monotone-admissible compatible systems.

soundness_flags.label: Corollary mean
soundness_flags.one_line: The reduction to ordinary mean SCM invokes Theorem 2 but states only alpha_0=sum_j w_j alpha_j; it omits Theorem 2's stronger stable-loading clause that the same w represents b_0 in every compatible factorization.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Redefine post-period functional invariance over admissible compatible systems B with monotone left-continuous q_B, or bake monotonicity into B(P), then restate the iff in Conjecture 1 against that set.

Add the stable-loading/every-compatible-factorization clause explicitly to the mean sanity corollary, or weaken the corollary to a fixed-factorization common-shape corner rather than a direct application of Theorem 2.

For Conjecture 2, include a small nondegenerate schematic witness with J=3 and T0=2 showing exact convex pre-fit, row-span failure, and two monotone post curves; this would make the open-set obstruction less dependent on prose.

recommended_next_step: Patch the admissibility quantifier in Assumption postconstant/Conjecture 1 and repair the mean-corner reduction before advancing to Stage 0.
